## Description

Please include a summary of the change, what problem it solves, and the motivation or context behind it. Also include any relevant issues this PR resolves (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-functional changes to documentation)
- [ ] Refactoring (non-functional code cleanups or restructures)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. Please also list any relevant details for your test configuration.

- **Test A**: Description of test and command used
- **Test B**: Description of test and command used

### Verification Checklist

- [ ] Manually tested the changes in the visual editor canvas
- [ ] Generated Beam code compiles and runs successfully
- [ ] Automated tests run and pass (`pnpm test`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (e.g., in `docs/` or `README.md`)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint errors (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have linked any related issues
